zh.Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登
zh.Yelden, Bedford, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Trailly於大約1090年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登時，他的父親Geoffrey De Trailly I42歲，母親Alberade de Helmsley21歲。他於大約1110年與Albreda Espec在英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1158年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Trailly于大约1090年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾也爾登时，他的父亲Geoffrey De Trailly I42岁，母亲Alberade de Helmsley21岁。他于大约1110年与Albreda Espec在英国英格兰貝德福爾也爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1158年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Trailly

variants.name: Trail
meanings: Scottish: unexplained, perhaps from a lost or unidentified placename. There is a stream called Abhainn Traill running into Upper Loch Torridon (Ross and Cromarty).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Trailly was born about 1090, in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey De Trailly I, was 42 and his mother, Alberade de Helmsley, was 21. He married Albreda Espec about 1110, in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died before 1158.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Trailly est né environ 1090, à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey De Trailly I, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alberade de Helmsley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Albreda Espec environ 1110, à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé avant 1158.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Trailly um 1090 in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Trailly I 42 und seine Mutter Alberade de Helmsley 21. Er hat um 1110 in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Albreda Espec geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1158.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Trailly è nato il circa 1090 nel Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey De Trailly I, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Alberade de Helmsley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Albreda Espec circa 1110, nel Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì prima del 1158.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Traillyが約1090年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey De Trailly Iは42歳，母Alberade de Helmsleyは21歳であった。約1110年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンでAlbreda Especと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1158年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Trailly(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Trailly I(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alberade de Helmsley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서 Albreda Espec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1158년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Trailly nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey De Trailly I, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alberade de Helmsley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda Espec aproximadamente 1110, em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1158.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Trailly родился около 1090 г. в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Trailly I было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alberade de Helmsley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda Espec около 1110 г. в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер перед 1158 г.
